params.description: On Feb 12, 1721, Bach composed the greatest concerto in the history of music. Bach was invited to compose a piece for Christian, the Margraviate of Brandenburg. Instead of following traditional composition style of putting a group of similar solo instruments together, he used different solo instruments. Using all musical instruments possible, Bach involved 7 instruments even for the shortest No. 6 prelude. Unfortunately, the sextet of Brandenburg was unable to play this concerto due to the lack  …
